title: CustomActions
content:
# CustomActions

Inherits from: ApiServiceModel


## Methods


### create_custom_action(data: Optional[Union[requests.CustomActionCreate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.CustomActionCreate

Create Custom Action


### list_custom_actions(pagination_type: Optional[Literal[limits, cursor, stream]], page_size: Optional[int], page: Optional[int], next: Optional[str], previous: Optional[str], direction: Optional[Literal[asc, desc]], sort_by: Optional[Sequence[str]], data: Optional[Union[requests.CustomActionsList, Mapping[str, object]]], fetch: bool, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> Union[KList[type.CustomAction], responses.CustomActionsListPaginatedResponseCursor]

Returns a list of Custom Action objects. The list can be optionally filtered and sorted on the server before being returned.


### create_custom_actions_type(data: Optional[Union[requests.CustomActionsTypeCreate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.CustomActionsTypeCreate

Create a new Custom Action Type.


### list_custom_actions_types(pagination_type: Optional[Literal[limits, cursor, stream]], page_size: Optional[int], page: Optional[int], next: Optional[str], previous: Optional[str], direction: Optional[Literal[asc, desc]], sort_by: Optional[Sequence[str]], search: Optional[Sequence[str]], app_names: Optional[Sequence[str]], fetch: bool, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> Union[KList[type.CustomActionType], responses.CustomActionsTypesListPaginatedCursor]

Returns a list of Custom Action Type objects. The list can be optionally filtered and sorted on the server before being returned. **Permission Required:** `kelvin.permission.custom-actions.read`.


### delete_custom_action_type(name: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Permanently delete an existing Custom Action Type. An error will be returned if there are any current Custom Action linked to the Custom Action Type. This cannot be undone once the API request has been submitted.


### get_custom_actions_type(name: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.CustomActionsTypeGet

Retrieves the parameters of a Custom Action Type.


### update_custom_actions_type(name: str, data: Optional[Union[requests.CustomActionsTypeUpdate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.CustomActionsTypeUpdate

Updates an existing Custom Action Type with any new values passed through the body parameters. All body parameters are optional and if not provided will remain unchanged. Only the unique identifier `name` can not be changed.


### delete_custom_action(action_id: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Permanently delete an existing Custom Action.


### get_custom_action(action_id: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.CustomActionGet

Get Custom Action

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client()
result = client.client.api.custom_actions.create_custom_action()
